name: omega-ide-context
description: Sends structured code context to the local Omega capture engine so your coding sessions are included in daily summaries.

omega.apiPort.description: Port that the local Omega API server listens on.

omega.enabled.description: Enable or disable Omega IDE context capture.

omega.sendVisibleCode.description: Include the visible code in the viewport when sending context. Disable if you work with sensitive code.
